name: default-ai-engineering-stack
description: Opinionated default GitHub/open-source framework stack for Spec / Loop / Verify / Memory.

spec.why: Purpose-built open-source toolkit for Spec-Driven Development with agent integrations and specify CLI.

loop.why: Stateful graph runtime for resilient agent workflows and explicit loop orchestration.

verify.why: Language-aware static analysis and security checks across many languages, suitable as a default AI-code verification gate.

memory.why: Universal memory layer for AI agents with Python and npm support; suitable for durable agent memory beyond local docs.
